headline: Sony CEO Unloads Stock Amid PlayStation Pivot and Stablecoin Push
summary: Sony CEO Hiroki Totoki sold more than half of his direct holdings in the conglomerate as it unveils two new initiatives.

raw.headline: Sony CEO Unloads Stock Amid PlayStation Pivot and Stablecoin Push
raw.summary: Sony CEO Hiroki Totoki sold more than half of his direct holdings in the conglomerate as it unveils two new initiatives.

headline: Mamdani’s $50 World Cup jersey stunt proves some of the oldest criticisms of socialism correct: ‘The odds are extremely stacked against you’
summary: Democratic socialism stresses "affordability," but is a $50 World Cup jersey that almost nobody can buy really affordable?
